name: Principality of Mimolot route corridor 2
transition_feel: This route makes House Mimolot legible through its movement controls, trust signals, and visible logistics.
handoff_custom: Travelers are expected to declare destination, relation, and practical purpose before tension rises.
paperwork_and_permission_model: Documents help, but recognizable sponsorship or useful clarity matters just as much.
patrol_rhythm: Routine by day; selective and sharper after dark.
after_dark_change: Informal power and private trust outrun posted procedure after sunset.
